name: Simplifae slow-method parity inventory
purpose: Machine-readable contract for the quality expected from fast/premium tender processing before data is promoted into Discovery, Tender Detail, or the document viewer.

conceptual_categories.label: Detailed Scope
conceptual_categories.description: What the contract is about, including object, lot structure, execution context, CPVs, scope boundaries, and technical/service/work lines.

conceptual_categories.label: Required Documents
conceptual_categories.description: Envelope-aware checklist of what the bidder must submit or later accredit, with exact source-page evidence.
must_not_include: raw contract-object paragraphs as document labels
generic missing-doc placeholders when documents are recovered

conceptual_categories.label: Admission Criteria
conceptual_categories.description: Who may participate and what proves eligibility: capacity, DEUC/ESPD, solvency, guarantees, UTE commitments, declarations, insurance, classifications, and required means.
must_not_include: criterion weights used to rank offers

conceptual_categories.label: Award Criteria
conceptual_categories.description: How bids are evaluated: price, formula criteria, value-judgment criteria, quality scores, timing reductions, formulas, scoring thresholds and weights.

conceptual_categories.label: Commercial Facts
conceptual_categories.description: Estimated value, base budget, contract duration, provisional guarantee and definitive guarantee, each with provenance and evidence when document-backed.
must_not_include: fixed definitive guarantee amount when the source only states a percentage of future award

conceptual_categories.label: Tender Documents
conceptual_categories.description: Recovered local documents used by evidence chips and viewer navigation.
must_not_include: source-only document URL when local viewer-backed file exists

conceptual_categories.label: Document Viewer Evidence
conceptual_categories.description: Source-backed references that jump to exact rendered document pages in the Simplifae viewer.

golden_reference_tenders.reason: Regression canary for structured notice plus PCAP/PPT evidence, admission criteria, award criteria, required documents and viewer references.
Legacy/source-backed static tender used to protect previous Tender Detail behaviour.
Manual slow-method tender with detailed scope, requirements, lots/docs and viewer evidence.
Manual slow-method tender with DANA works documents and lot structure.
Manual slow-method tender with DANA works documents.
Manual slow-method tender with DANA works documents.
Manual/imported source-backed tender used for regression coverage.
Manual/imported source-backed tender used for viewer and required-doc coverage.
